name: dsstore
description: Single-plugin marketplace for dsstore-notes — per-file ambient notes stored in .DS_Store under custom record code 'llMD'.

plugins.name: dsstore-notes
plugins.description: Per-file ambient notes for agentic coding tools, stored in .DS_Store under custom record code 'llMD'. Notes auto-inject into context on file read; agent is nudged to refresh them after edits.
